entries.name: Carl
entries.gameplay_translation: Main player character with classless start, under-equipped gear, and improvised combat emphasis.

entries.name: Princess Donut
entries.gameplay_translation: Co-protagonist companion with separate stats, Level 0 civilian start, high charisma and fame potential.

entries.name: Mordecai
entries.gameplay_translation: Guide NPC who explains rules, gives early objectives, and escalates in stress.

entries.name: System announcements
entries.gameplay_translation: Event-driven UI voice for achievements, rewards, class selection, floor timers, deaths, and mockery.

entries.name: Floor collapse timers
entries.gameplay_translation: Visible countdown that affects pacing, NPC behavior, availability, and end-of-floor failure.

entries.name: Carl's Leather Jacket
entries.gameplay_translation: Named torso gear with armor value, durability, and plot relevance.

entries.name: No-pants debuff
entries.gameplay_translation: Named defensive penalty and System-commentary trigger.

entries.name: Crude Blast Charge
entries.gameplay_translation: First safe tutorial expression of Carl's explosive crafting identity.

entries.name: Tutorial Guild
entries.gameplay_translation: Opening controlled environment for rules, inventory, System UI, and Mordecai guidance.

entries.name: Viewer and sponsor pressure
entries.gameplay_translation: Popularity, sponsor drops, audience faction preferences, and spectacle incentives.
